headline: Assessing CMS Energy (CMS) Valuation After Strong Recent Returns And Earnings Profile
summary: What recent performance says about CMS Energy (CMS) CMS Energy (CMS) has drawn fresh attention after a recent move in its share price, with the stock closing at $78.07 and showing double digit total returns over the past year. For investors tracking utilities, those returns, alongside annual revenue of US$8.54b and net income of US$1.06b, raise questions about how the company’s mix of electric, gas, and clean energy operations is being reflected in the current valuation. See our latest...
